title: deiregyne nonantzin
intro: Deiregyne nonantzin, also known as the Mexican orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Deiregyne nonantzin include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Deiregyne nonantzin include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", Deiregyne nonantzin benefits include anti-inflammatory and spasmolytic effects, reducing inflammation in lungs and inhibiting spasms in jejunum segments.
